(*******************************************************************

 The comprehension bicategory of functors into the category of strict categories

 Contents
 1. The comprehension pseudofunctor
 2. Preservation of cartesian cells
 3. The comprehension bicategory

 *******************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.CategoryOfSetCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.StreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.TotalCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.IsosInTotal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.IsOpfibration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.IsPullback.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.GrothendieckConstruction.Projection.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Examples.FibrationsInStrictCats.

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.ExamplesOfCleavings.CodomainCleaving.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.ExamplesOfCleavings.FunctorsIntoCatCleaving.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Products.
Import Products.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Logic.ComprehensionBicat.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. The comprehension pseudofunctor
 *)

disp_psfunctor_data disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
  (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
  (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)


disp_psfunctor_data disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
  (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
  (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)

  
∏ x : bicat_of_strict_cats,
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x
→ Core.ob_disp
    (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
       (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats))
    (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats x)
∏ (x y : bicat_of_strict_cats)
(f : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x)
(yy : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) y),
Core.mor_disp xx yy f
→ Core.mor_disp (?pr1 x xx) (?pr1 y yy)
    (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)
∏ (x y : bicat_of_strict_cats)
(f g : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧) (α : f ==> g)
(xx : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x)
(yy : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) y)
(ff : Core.mor_disp xx yy f)
(gg : Core.mor_disp xx yy g),
disp_2cells α ff gg
→ disp_2cells
    (psfunctor_on_cells
       (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) α)
    (?pr10 x y f xx yy ff) (?pr10 x y g xx yy gg)
∏ (x : bicat_of_strict_cats)
(xx : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) x)
  (Core.id_disp (?pr1 x xx))
  (?pr10 x x (id₁ x) xx xx (Core.id_disp xx))
(λ _ : ∏ (x : bicat_of_strict_cats)
       (xx : Core.ob_disp
               (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                  disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x),
       disp_invertible_2cell
         (psfunctor_id
            (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) x)
         (Core.id_disp (?pr1 x xx))
         (?pr10 x x (id₁ x) xx xx (Core.id_disp xx)),
 ∏ (x y z : bicat_of_strict_cats)
 (f : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 (g : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ y, z ⟧)
 (xx : Core.ob_disp
         (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
            disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x)
 (yy : Core.ob_disp
         (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
            disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) y)
 (zz : Core.ob_disp
         (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
            disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) z)
 (ff : Core.mor_disp xx yy f)
 (gg : Core.mor_disp yy zz g),
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
      f g)
   (Core.comp_disp (?pr10 x y f xx yy ff)
      (?pr10 y z g yy zz gg))
   (?pr10 x z (f · g) xx zz (Core.comp_disp ff gg)))
  ?pr12

  
∏ x : bicat_of_strict_cats,
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x
→ Core.ob_disp
    (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
       (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats))
    (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats x)
 exact (λ C F,
           total_setcategory_of_set_functor F
           ,,
           pr1_total_category_of_set_functor F).
  
∏ (x y : bicat_of_strict_cats)
(f : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x)
(yy : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) y),
Core.mor_disp xx yy f
→ Core.mor_disp
    ((λ (C : bicat_of_strict_cats)
      (F : Core.ob_disp
             (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C),
      total_setcategory_of_set_functor F,,
      pr1_total_category_of_set_functor F) x xx)
    ((λ (C : bicat_of_strict_cats)
      (F : Core.ob_disp
             (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C),
      total_setcategory_of_set_functor F,,
      pr1_total_category_of_set_functor F) y yy)
    (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)

F: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
Core.mor_disp
  (pr2
     (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁,,
      pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁))
  (pr2
     (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂,,
      pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂))
  (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) F,,
   functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_strict_cats
F: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
pr2
  (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁,,
   pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
· pr1
    (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) F,,
     functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) ==>
pr2
  (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) F,,
   functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
· pr2
    (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂,,
     pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)

α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
is_invertible_2cell ?η

F: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁

α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
pr2
  (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁,,
   pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
· pr1
    (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) F,,
     functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α) ==>
pr2
  (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) F,,
   functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
· pr2
    (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₂,,
     pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
 exact (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm F α).

F: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm F α))

      exact (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm F α).
  
∏ (x y : bicat_of_strict_cats)
(f g : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧) (α : f ==> g)
(xx : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x)
(yy : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) y)
(ff : Core.mor_disp xx yy f)
(gg : Core.mor_disp xx yy g),
disp_2cells α ff gg
→ disp_2cells
    (psfunctor_on_cells
       (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) α)
    ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_strict_cats)
      (F : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧)
      (G₁ : Core.ob_disp
              (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁)
      (G₂ : Core.ob_disp
              (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂)
      (α0 : Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F),
      functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α0,,
      make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α0)
           (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α0))) x y f xx yy ff)
    ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_strict_cats)
      (F : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧)
      (G₁ : Core.ob_disp
              (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁)
      (G₂ : Core.ob_disp
              (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂)
      (α0 : Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F),
      functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α0,,
      make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α0)
           (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α0))) x y g xx yy gg)
 
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_strict_cats
F₁, F₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
α: F₁ ==> F₂
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
β₁: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₁
β₂: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₂
p: disp_2cells α β₁ β₂
disp_2cells
  (psfunctor_on_cells
     (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) α,,
   nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor α β₁ β₂ p)
  (pr2
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F₁ β₁,,
      make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F₁ β₁)
           (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F₁ β₁))))
  (pr2
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F₂ β₂,,
      make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F₂ β₂)
           (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F₂ β₂))))

    abstract
      (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply C₂ | ] ;
       intro x ;
       cbn ;
       rewrite id_left, id_right ;
       apply idpath).
  
∏ (x : bicat_of_strict_cats)
(xx : Core.ob_disp
        (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) x),
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) x)
  (Core.id_disp
     ((λ (C : bicat_of_strict_cats)
       (F : Core.ob_disp
              (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C),
       total_setcategory_of_set_functor F,,
       pr1_total_category_of_set_functor F) x xx))
  ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_strict_cats)
    (F : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧)
    (G₁ : Core.ob_disp
            (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
               disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁)
    (G₂ : Core.ob_disp
            (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
               disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂)
    (α : Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F),
    functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α,,
    make_invertible_2cell
      (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm F
            α)
         (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
            F α))) x x (id₁ x) xx xx (Core.id_disp xx))

F: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C
disp_invertible_2cell
  (psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) C)
  (Core.id_disp
     ((λ (C : bicat_of_strict_cats)
       (F : Core.ob_disp
              (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C),

  ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_strict_cats)
    (F : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧)
    (G₁ : Core.ob_disp
            (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data

         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm F
            α)
         (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
            F α))) C C (id₁ C) F F (Core.id_disp F))

F: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C

  (psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) C)
  (Core.id_disp
     ((λ (C : bicat_of_strict_cats)

    (G₁ : Core.ob_disp

C: bicat_of_strict_cats
F: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C
(λ x : disp_2cells
         (psfunctor_id
            (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) C)
         (Core.id_disp
            ((λ (C : bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (F : Core.ob_disp
                     (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat)
                     C),
              total_setcategory_of_set_functor F,,
              pr1_total_category_of_set_functor F) C F))
         ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (F : bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧)
           (G₁ : Core.ob_disp
                   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                      disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat)
                   C₁)
           (G₂ : Core.ob_disp
                   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
                      disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat)
                   C₂) (α : Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F),
           functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α,,
           make_invertible_2cell
             (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
                (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
                   F α)
                (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
                   F α))) C C (id₁ C) F F
            (Core.id_disp F)),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) C)
   x) ?pr1

    
C: bicat_of_strict_cats
F: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C
disp_2cells
  (psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) C)
  (Core.id_disp

F₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
G₃: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₃
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₁
β: Core.mor_disp G₂ G₃ F₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_on_comp α
        β,,
      functors_into_cat_comprehension_data_subproof1
        C₁ C₂ C₃ F₁ F₂ G₁ G₂ G₃ α β))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: bicat_of_strict_cats
F₁: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
F₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₂, C₃ ⟧

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
G₃: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₃
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₁
β: Core.mor_disp G₂ G₃ F₂
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr11 (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_on_comp
           α β,,
         functors_into_cat_comprehension_data_subproof1
           C₁ C₂ C₃ F₁ F₂ G₁ G₂ G₃ α β))

      exact (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_on_comp α β).
Defined.


is_disp_psfunctor disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
  (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
  (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
  functors_into_cat_comprehension_data


is_disp_psfunctor disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
  (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
  (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
  functors_into_cat_comprehension_data

  
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_id2 ff)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f,
      disp_2cells p
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
     (psfunctor_id2
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)
     (disp_id2
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)))
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) h,
      disp_2cells p
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data hh))
     (psfunctor_vcomp
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) η φ)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ)))
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
pr1
  (disp_lunitor
     (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : id₁ (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats a)
            · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f,
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (Core.id_disp
              (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a
                 aa))
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
     (psfunctor_lunitor
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_rwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_id
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 aa))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
              (Core.id_disp aa) ff))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lunitor ff))))
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
pr1
  (disp_runitor
     (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f
            · id₁
                (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats b) ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f,
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (Core.id_disp
              (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data b
                 bb)))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
     (psfunctor_runitor
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_id
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 bb))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
              (Core.id_disp bb)))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_runitor ff))))
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_lwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg
              hh))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
           (Core.comp_disp gg hh)))
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_lassociator ff gg hh))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f
            · (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g
               · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   h) ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (f · g · h),
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (Core.comp_disp
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh)))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)))
     (psfunctor_lassociator
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f g h)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lassociator
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh))
           (disp_rwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh)
              (disp_psfunctor_comp
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff gg)))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)))
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₁)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_lwhisker ff ηη))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f
            · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g₁ ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (f · g₂),
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg₁))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp ff gg₂)))
     (psfunctor_lwhisker
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f η)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_lwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₂)))
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁ gg)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_rwhisker gg ηη))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f₁
            · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (f₂ · g),
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁)
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp ff₂ gg)))
     (psfunctor_rwhisker
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g η)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_rwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg)
           (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₂ gg)))

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_id2 ff)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f,
      disp_2cells p
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
     (psfunctor_id2
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)
     (disp_id2
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)))

pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_id2 ff)) =

     (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))

f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧

bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
∏ x : pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa),
pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_id2 ff)) x =
pr1
  (disp_id2
     (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x

    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧

bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1

     (disp_id2 ff)) x =
pr1

bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_id2 ff)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_id2
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x)
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_id2 ff)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                      ff) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff) x))) ?p)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_id2
          (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
       x)

    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_id2 ff)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_id2
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x)
 apply idpath.
    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_id2 ff)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                      ff) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff) x)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (disp_id2
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)) x))))
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_id2
          (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
       x)
 
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
     (nat_trans_id f) ff ff (disp_id2 ff) x) =
id₁
  (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
          (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

      
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
     (nat_trans_id f) ff ff (disp_id2 ff) x) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

      apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
  
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) h,
      disp_2cells p
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data hh))
     (psfunctor_vcomp
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) η φ)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ)))

φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) =
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ))

ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
∏ x : pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa),
pr1
  (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) x =
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ)) x

f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ))

a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                      ff) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    hh) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff) x))) ?p)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ))
       x)

φ: g ==> h

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

pr1

        (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ))
     x)
 apply idpath.
    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                      ff) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    hh) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff) x)))
     (idpath
        (pr1
           (pr1
              (disp_vcomp2
                 (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ηη)
                 (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    φφ)) x))))
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη)
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data φφ))
       x)
 
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
     (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ) ff hh
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ) x) =
id₁
  (pr1 (# bb (η (pr1 x) · φ (pr1 x)))
     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb (η (pr1 x)) (φ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · # (pr1 (# bb (φ (pr1 x))))
       (idtoiso
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η ff gg ηη x))
   · idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq φ
          gg hh φφ x))

      
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
     (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ) ff hh
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ) x) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp bb (η (pr1 x)) (φ (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
· # (pr1 (# bb (φ (pr1 x))))
    (idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η
          ff gg ηη x))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq φ gg
       hh φφ x)

bb: Core.ob_disp

hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp bb (η (pr1 x)) (φ (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
· # (pr1 (# bb (φ (pr1 x))))
    (idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η
          ff gg ηη x))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq φ gg
       hh φφ x) =
idtoiso
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
     (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ) ff hh
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ) x)

  (idtoiso

        (functor_comp bb (η (pr1 x)) (φ (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

    (idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η
          ff gg ηη x))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq φ gg
       hh φφ x) = ?b

a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?t2 =
# (pr1 (# bb (φ (pr1 x))))
  (idtoiso
     (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η ff
        gg ηη x))

          apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# (pr1 bb) (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))).
        
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp bb (η (pr1 x)) (φ (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η ff gg ηη x))) = ?y'

η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp bb (η (pr1 x)) (φ (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η ff gg ηη x)))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                 (eq_in_set_fiber
                    (functor_comp bb (pr1 η (pr1 x)) (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))
                    (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))).

  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber

· idtoiso

       hh φφ x) =
idtoiso
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
     (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ) ff hh
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ) x)

η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp bb (pr1 η (pr1 x))
           (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))

           ff gg ηη x)))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq φ gg
       hh φφ x)

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                 (eq_in_set_fiber
                    (functor_comp bb (pr1 η (pr1 x)) (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))
                    (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))

a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f, g, h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

gg: Core.mor_disp aa bb g
hh: Core.mor_disp aa bb h
ηη: disp_2cells η ff gg
φφ: disp_2cells φ gg hh
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp bb (pr1 η (pr1 x))
            (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))
         (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (pr1 φ (pr1 x)))
         (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η
            ff gg ηη x)) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq φ gg
        hh φφ x)) =
idtoiso
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
     (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ) ff hh
     (disp_vcomp2 ηη φφ) x)

      apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
  
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
pr1
  (disp_lunitor
     (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : id₁ (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats a)
            · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f,
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (Core.id_disp
              (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a
                 aa))
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
     (psfunctor_lunitor
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_rwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_id
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 aa))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
              (Core.id_disp aa) ff))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lunitor ff))))

a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_lunitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2

                 ff)

a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_lunitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (Core.id_disp
                         (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            a aa))
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (Core.id_disp
                    (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       a aa))
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)) x))) ?p)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_vcomp2
             (disp_rwhisker
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff)
                (disp_psfunctor_id
                   disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                   (cod_disp_bicat
                      bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   aa))
             (disp_psfunctor_comp
                disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                (Core.id_disp aa) ff))
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
             (disp_lunitor ff))) x)

    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_lunitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_rwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_id
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 aa))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
              (Core.id_disp aa) ff))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lunitor ff))) x)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !id_right ;
         rewrite functor_id ;
         apply idpath).
    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_lunitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (Core.id_disp
                         (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            a aa))
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (Core.id_disp
                    (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       a aa))
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)) x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_vcomp2
             (disp_rwhisker
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff)
                (disp_psfunctor_id
                   disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                   (cod_disp_bicat
                      bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   aa))
             (disp_psfunctor_comp
                disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                (Core.id_disp aa) ff))
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
             (disp_lunitor ff))) x)
 
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp bb (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)))
                   (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
        · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
            (idtoiso
               (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  f ff
                  (id₁ (pr1 x),,
                   pr1
                     (idtoiso
                        (eq_in_set_fiber
                           (functor_id aa (pr1 x))
                           (pr2 x)))))
             · # (pr1 (ff (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1

                          (pr2 x)))))
        · pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) aa)
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a))
                (functor_composite_data f bb))
             (nat_trans_id aa)
             (pre_whisker
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) ff))
          ff (disp_lunitor ff) x))

f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))

                           (pr2 x)))))

                 (pr1

                          (functor_id aa (pr1 x))
                          (pr2 x)))))
        · pr1

   · idtoiso

                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) aa)
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a))
                (functor_composite_data f bb))
             (nat_trans_id aa)
             (pre_whisker
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) ff))
          ff (disp_lunitor ff) x)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

?t2 =
pr1

     (eq_in_set_fiber

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))

                  f ff

          ff (disp_lunitor ff) x)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))

               (functor_comp bb (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)))
                  (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
             maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  f ff
                  (id₁ (pr1 x),,
                   pr1
                     (idtoiso
                        (eq_in_set_fiber
                           (functor_id aa ...) (pr2 x)))) @
                maponpaths (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id aa (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
            eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) aa)
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a))
                (functor_composite_data f bb))
             (nat_trans_id aa)
             (pre_whisker
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) ff))
          ff (disp_lunitor ff) x)) = ?b

        
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
         maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           ((eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_comp bb (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)))
                  (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
             maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  f ff
                  (id₁ (pr1 x),,
                   pr1
                     (idtoiso
                        (eq_in_set_fiber
                           (functor_id aa ...) (pr2 x)))) @
                maponpaths (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id aa (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
            eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) aa)
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a))
                (functor_composite_data f bb))
             (nat_trans_id aa)
             (pre_whisker
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) ff))
          ff (disp_lunitor ff) x))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                 _
                 ((eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp bb _ _) _ @ _) @ _)).
      
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
         pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
        (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof
           a b f aa bb ff x) @
      (eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp bb
            (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
         ((eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp bb (# f (id₁ (pr1 x)))
                (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
           maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                f ff
                (id₁ (pr1 x),,
                 pr1
                   (idtoiso
                      (eq_in_set_fiber
                         (functor_id aa ...) (pr2 x)))) @
              maponpaths (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                (eq_in_set_fiber
                   (functor_id aa (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
          eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (nat_trans_id f)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) aa)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 a))
              (functor_composite_data f bb))
           (nat_trans_id aa)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 a)) ff)) ff
        (disp_lunitor ff) x)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

      apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
  
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
pr1
  (disp_runitor
     (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f
            · id₁
                (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats b) ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f,
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (Core.id_disp
              (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data b
                 bb)))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff))
     (psfunctor_runitor
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_id
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 bb))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
              (Core.id_disp bb)))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_runitor ff))))
 
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

pr1
  (disp_runitor
     (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) =
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_lwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)

           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
           (Core.id_disp bb)))
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_runitor ff)))

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

∏ x : pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa),
pr1
  (disp_runitor

           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_runitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_id

a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_runitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)
                      (Core.id_disp
                         (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            b bb))) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)
                 (Core.id_disp
                    (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       b bb))) x))) ?p)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_vcomp2
             (disp_lwhisker
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff)
                (disp_psfunctor_id
                   disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                   (cod_disp_bicat
                      bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   bb))
             (disp_psfunctor_comp
                disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ff (Core.id_disp bb)))
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
             (disp_runitor ff))) x)

    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_runitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_id
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 bb))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
              (Core.id_disp bb)))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_runitor ff))) x)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !id_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_runitor
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : b
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)
                      (Core.id_disp
                         (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            b bb))) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)
                 (Core.id_disp
                    (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       b bb))) x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof0
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_vcomp2
             (disp_lwhisker
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff)
                (disp_psfunctor_id
                   disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                   (cod_disp_bicat
                      bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   bb))
             (disp_psfunctor_comp
                disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ff (Core.id_disp bb)))
          (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
             (disp_runitor ff))) x)
 
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof0
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                   (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
        · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
            (pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
        · pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 b)) bb))
             ff (pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id bb))) ff
          (disp_runitor ff) x))

      
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof0
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                   (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
        · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
            (pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
        · pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 b)) bb))
             ff (pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id bb))) ff
          (disp_runitor ff) x)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

      
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof0
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                   (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
        · # (pr1 (# bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))))
            (pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
        · pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · idtoiso
       (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 b)) bb))
             ff (pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id bb))) ff
          (disp_runitor ff) x)) = ?b

aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
