x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof0
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
         maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           ((eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_comp bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                  (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
             maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
            eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 b)) bb))
             ff (pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id bb))) ff
          (disp_runitor ff) x)) = ?b

        
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof0
        a b f aa bb ff x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp bb
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
         maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           ((eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_comp bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                  (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
             maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
            eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
          (nat_trans_id f)
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 b)) bb))
             ff (pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id bb))) ff
          (disp_runitor ff) x))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                 _
                 ((eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp bb _ _) _ @ _) @ _)).
      
a, b: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 b ⟦ f (pr1 x), f (pr1 x) ⟧,
         pr1 (# bb z) (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))
        (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof0
           a b f aa bb ff x) @
      (eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp bb
            (id₁ (f (pr1 x)) · id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
         ((eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp bb (id₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)) @
           maponpaths (# (pr1 bb) (id₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
          eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (nat_trans_id f)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 b)) bb))
           ff (pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id bb))) ff
        (disp_runitor ff) x)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id bb (f (pr1 x)))
        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

      apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.

f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_lwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg
              hh))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
           (Core.comp_disp gg hh)))
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_lassociator ff gg hh))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f
            · (# (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g
               · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   h) ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (f · g · h),
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (Core.comp_disp
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh)))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)))
     (psfunctor_lassociator
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f g h)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lassociator
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh))
           (disp_rwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh)
              (disp_psfunctor_comp
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff gg)))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)))

hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_comp
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg hh))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat

              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
              (Core.comp_disp gg hh)))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lassociator ff gg hh))) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : d
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)
                      (Core.comp_disp
                         (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            gg)
                         (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            hh))) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    (Core.comp_disp
                       (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)) x)
            ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)
                 (Core.comp_disp
                    (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       gg)
                    (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       hh))) x))) ?p)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_vcomp2
             (disp_lassociator
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff)
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   gg)
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   hh))
             (disp_rwhisker
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   hh)
                (disp_psfunctor_comp
                   disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                   (cod_disp_bicat
                      bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff gg)))
          (disp_psfunctor_comp
             disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
             (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
             (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
             functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
             (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)) x)

h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_comp
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg hh))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
              (Core.comp_disp gg hh)))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lassociator ff gg hh))) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lassociator
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg)
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh))
           (disp_rwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 hh)
              (disp_psfunctor_comp
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff gg)))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)) x)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite functor_id ;
         apply idpath).
    
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_vcomp2
           (disp_lwhisker
              (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 ff)
              (disp_psfunctor_comp
                 disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                 (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                 functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                 gg hh))
           (disp_psfunctor_comp
              disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
              (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
              (Core.comp_disp gg hh)))
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lassociator ff gg hh))) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : d
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)
                      (Core.comp_disp
                         (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            gg)
                         (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                            hh))) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    (Core.comp_disp
                       (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)) x)
            ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)
                 (Core.comp_disp
                    (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       gg)
                    (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                       hh))) x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_vcomp2
             (disp_lassociator
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff)
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   gg)
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   hh))
             (disp_rwhisker
                (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   hh)
                (disp_psfunctor_comp
                   disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
                   (cod_disp_bicat
                      bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
                   functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                   ff gg)))
          (disp_psfunctor_comp
             disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
             (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
             (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
             functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
             (Core.comp_disp ff gg) hh)) x)
 
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp dd
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
     · # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
     · pr1
         (idtoiso
            (eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1 hh (pr1 g (f (pr1 x)))
                  (gg (f (pr1 x))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g h)))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
          (pre_whisker f
             (nat_trans_comp bb
                (functor_composite_data g cc)
                (functor_composite_data g
                   (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                (pre_whisker g hh))))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g)
             (functor_composite_data h dd))
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
             (pre_whisker f gg))
          (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g) hh))
       (disp_lassociator ff gg hh) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
            h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp dd
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
               · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
   · # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp dd
                   (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                   (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
                (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
        · # (pr1 (# dd (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
            (pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id dd
                        (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                              (pr2 x)))))))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                h hh
                (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
                 pr1
                   (idtoiso
                      (eq_in_set_fiber
                         (functor_id cc (g (f (...))))
                         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (...)))
                            (pr1 (pr1 ff (...))
                               (pr2 x)))))))
           · # (pr1 (hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1
                  (idtoiso
                     (eq_in_set_fiber
                        (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                              (pr2 x))))))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                   (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))))

      
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp dd
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
     · # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
     · pr1
         (idtoiso
            (eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1 hh (pr1 g (f (pr1 x)))
                  (gg (f (pr1 x))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g h)))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
          (pre_whisker f
             (nat_trans_comp bb
                (functor_composite_data g cc)
                (functor_composite_data g
                   (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                (pre_whisker g hh))))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g)
             (functor_composite_data h dd))
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
             (pre_whisker f gg))
          (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g) hh))
       (disp_lassociator ff gg hh) x) = ?b
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
            h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp dd
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
               · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
   · # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp dd
                   (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                   (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
                (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
        · # (pr1 (# dd (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
            (pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id dd
                        (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                              (pr2 x)))))))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                h hh
                (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
                 pr1
                   (idtoiso
                      (eq_in_set_fiber
                         (functor_id cc (g (f (...))))
                         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (...)))
                            (pr1 (pr1 ff (...))
                               (pr2 x)))))))
           · # (pr1 (hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1
                  (idtoiso
                     (eq_in_set_fiber
                        (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                              (pr2 x))))))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                   (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))))

      
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧

aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp dd
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
     · # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
     · pr1
         (idtoiso
            (eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1 hh (pr1 g (f (pr1 x)))
                  (gg (f (pr1 x))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g h)))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
          (pre_whisker f
             (nat_trans_comp bb
                (functor_composite_data g cc)
                (functor_composite_data g
                   (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                (pre_whisker g hh))))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g)
             (functor_composite_data h dd))
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
             (pre_whisker f gg))
          (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g) hh))
       (disp_lassociator ff gg hh) x) = ?b

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp dd
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
     · # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
         (pr1
            (idtoiso
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
     · pr1
         (idtoiso
            (eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1 hh (pr1 g (f (pr1 x)))
                  (gg (f (pr1 x))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))) =
?y'

            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
          ((eq_in_set_fiber
              (functor_comp dd
                 (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                 (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
              (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                    (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
            maponpaths
              (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                    (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                       (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
           eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (pr1 g (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
                (gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                   (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                 (eq_in_set_fiber
                    (functor_comp dd _ _)
                    _)).

f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp dd
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
      maponpaths
        (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        ((eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_comp dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
            (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
               (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
          maponpaths
            (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
            (eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
         eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (pr1 g (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
              (gg (pr1 f (pr1 x)) (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g h)))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
          (pre_whisker f
             (nat_trans_comp bb
                (functor_composite_data g cc)
                (functor_composite_data g
                   (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                (pre_whisker g hh))))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data f g)
             (functor_composite_data h dd))
          (nat_trans_comp aa
             (functor_composite_data f bb)
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
             (pre_whisker f gg))
          (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g) hh))
       (disp_lassociator ff gg hh) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
            h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp dd
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
               · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
   · # (pr1 (# dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
       (pr1
          (idtoiso
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_comp dd
                   (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                   (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
                (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
        · # (pr1 (# dd (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))))
            (pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id dd
                        (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                              (pr2 x)))))))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                h hh
                (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
                 pr1
                   (idtoiso
                      (eq_in_set_fiber
                         (functor_id cc (g (f (...))))
                         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (...)))
                            (pr1 (pr1 ff (...))
                               (pr2 x)))))))
           · # (pr1 (hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
               (pr1
                  (idtoiso
                     (eq_in_set_fiber
                        (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x))
                              (pr2 x))))))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                   (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))))

pr1

     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp dd
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))

           (pr1 (pr1 hh (pr1 g (pr1 f (pr1 x))))

       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g h)))
       (nat_trans_comp aa

idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),

     (idtoiso

                              (pr2 x)))))))
        · (idtoiso
             (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                h hh

                 pr1

                         (functor_id cc (g (f (...))))
                         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (...)))
                            (pr1 (pr1 ff (...))
                               (pr2 x)))))))
           · # (pr1 (hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))

    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data f

       (nat_trans_comp aa

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d

gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp dd
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
             · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         ((eq_in_set_fiber

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp dd
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
             · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))

            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @

         (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         ((eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
           maponpaths
             (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
          eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (pr1 (pr1 hh (pr1 g (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
               (gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                  (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h)))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
           (pre_whisker f
              (nat_trans_comp bb
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)
                 (functor_composite_data g
                    (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                 (pre_whisker g hh))))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g)
              (functor_composite_data h dd))
           (nat_trans_comp aa
              (functor_composite_data f bb)
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
              (pre_whisker f gg))
           (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g)

                            (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id cc _) _))).

?t21 =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp dd (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
      maponpaths
        (# (pr1 dd) (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq h hh
          (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
           pr1
             (idtoiso
                (eq_in_set_fiber
                   (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
        maponpaths (pr11 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
                (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))))

              apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                       (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp dd _ _) _ @ _)).

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
            h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp dd
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
               · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
         maponpaths

                  (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))

                  (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
             maponpaths

                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
            functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq h
              hh
              (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
               pr1
                 (idtoiso
                    (eq_in_set_fiber
                       (functor_id cc (g (f ...)))
                       (pr1 (pr1 gg (f ...))
                          (pr1 (pr1 ff ...) (pr2 x)))))) @
            maponpaths (pr11 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
                    (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
          (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp dd
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
             · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))

         (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))

                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))

                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
          eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (pr1 (pr1 hh (pr1 g (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
               (gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                  (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h)))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
           (pre_whisker f
              (nat_trans_comp bb
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)
                 (functor_composite_data g
                    (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                 (pre_whisker g hh))))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g)
              (functor_composite_data h dd))
           (nat_trans_comp aa
              (functor_composite_data f bb)
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
              (pre_whisker f gg))
           (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g)
              hh)) (disp_lassociator ff gg hh) x))

      
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
            h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp dd
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
               · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           ((eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_comp dd
                  (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
               (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
             maponpaths
               (# (pr1 dd) (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
            functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq h
              hh
              (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
               pr1
                 (idtoiso
                    (eq_in_set_fiber
                       (functor_id cc (g (f ...)))
                       (pr1 (pr1 gg (f ...))
                          (pr1 (pr1 ff ...) (pr2 x)))))) @
            maponpaths (pr11 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
                    (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
          (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) = ?b
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp dd
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
             · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         ((eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
           maponpaths
             (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
          eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (pr1 (pr1 hh (pr1 g (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
               (gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                  (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h)))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
           (pre_whisker f
              (nat_trans_comp bb
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)
                 (functor_composite_data g
                    (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                 (pre_whisker g hh))))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g)
              (functor_composite_data h dd))
           (nat_trans_comp aa
              (functor_composite_data f bb)
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
              (pre_whisker f gg))
           (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g)
              hh)) (disp_lassociator ff gg hh) x))

      
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats

ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
            h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp dd
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
               · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           ((eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_comp dd
                  (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
               (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
             maponpaths
               (# (pr1 dd) (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
            functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq h
              hh
              (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
               pr1
                 (idtoiso
                    (eq_in_set_fiber
                       (functor_id cc (g (f ...)))
                       (pr1 (pr1 gg (f ...))
                          (pr1 (pr1 ff ...) (pr2 x)))))) @
            maponpaths (pr11 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
                    (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
          (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) = ?b

        
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧

aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
            h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
      pr1 (# dd z)
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
        a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp dd
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
               · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
           ((eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_comp dd
                  (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
               (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
             maponpaths
               (# (pr1 dd) (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
               (eq_in_set_fiber
                  (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                  (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
            functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq h
              hh
              (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
               pr1
                 (idtoiso
                    (eq_in_set_fiber
                       (functor_id cc (g (f ...)))
                       (pr1 (pr1 gg (f ...))
                          (pr1 (pr1 ff ...) (pr2 x)))))) @
            maponpaths (pr11 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
              (eq_in_set_fiber
                 (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
                 (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
                    (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
          (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat
                 _
                 (_ @ eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id dd _) _)).
      
a, b, c, d: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ c, d ⟧
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
dd: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) d
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
hh: Core.mor_disp cc dd h
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 x))),
               h (g (f (pr1 x))) ⟧,
         pr1 (# dd z)
           (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
              (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                 (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
        (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof1
           a b c d f g h aa bb cc dd ff gg hh x) @
      (eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp dd
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
             · # h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         ((eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
           maponpaths
             (# (pr1 dd) (# h (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
          functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq h
            hh
            (id₁ (g (f (pr1 x))),,
             pr1
               (idtoiso
                  (eq_in_set_fiber
                     (functor_id cc (g (f ...)))
                     (pr1 (pr1 gg (f ...))
                        (pr1 (pr1 ff ...) (pr2 x)))))) @
          maponpaths (pr11 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (eq_in_set_fiber
               (functor_id cc (g (f (pr1 x))))
               (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
                  (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
      eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
              (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp dd
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))
             · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
         ((eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_comp dd
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                   (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
           maponpaths
             (# (pr1 dd) (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 x))))))
             (eq_in_set_fiber
                (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
                (pr1 (pr1 hh (g (f (pr1 x))))
                   (pr1 (pr1 gg (f (pr1 x)))
                      (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) @
          eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id dd (h (g (f (pr1 x)))))
            (pr1 (pr1 hh (pr1 g (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
               (gg (pr1 f (pr1 x))
                  (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h)))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data g h) dd)) ff
           (pre_whisker f
              (nat_trans_comp bb
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)
                 (functor_composite_data g
                    (functor_composite_data h dd)) gg
                 (pre_whisker g hh))))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g) cc)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data f g)
              (functor_composite_data h dd))
           (nat_trans_comp aa
              (functor_composite_data f bb)
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff
              (pre_whisker f gg))
           (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g)
              hh)) (disp_lassociator ff gg hh) x))

      apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
  
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₁)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_lwhisker ff ηη))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f
            · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g₁ ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (f · g₂),
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg₁))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp ff gg₂)))
     (psfunctor_lwhisker
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f η)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_lwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₂)))
 
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₁)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_lwhisker ff ηη))) =
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_lwhisker
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₂))

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂

pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp

        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)

η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₁)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lwhisker ff ηη))) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : c
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         gg₁)) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    (Core.comp_disp ff gg₂)) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    gg₁)) x))) ?p)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_lwhisker
             (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ff)
             (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ηη))
          (disp_psfunctor_comp
             disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
             (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
             (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
             functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
             gg₂)) x)

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₁)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lwhisker ff ηη))) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_lwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff)
           (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp

           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₂))
     x)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id_left, id_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff gg₁)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_lwhisker ff ηη))) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : c
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff)
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         gg₁)) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    (Core.comp_disp ff gg₂)) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff)
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    gg₁)) x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_lwhisker
             (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ff)
             (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ηη))
          (disp_psfunctor_comp
             disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
             (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
             (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
             functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff
             gg₂)) x)
 
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (pre_whisker f η)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₁))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (pre_whisker f η)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₁))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη) x) =
?b
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (pre_whisker f η)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₁))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη) x) =
?b

        
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) =
?y'

        
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) =
?b

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) =

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
# (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) = 
?t2

aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
