ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?t2 =
# (pr1 (# cc (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x)))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

          apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# (pr1 cc) _)).
        
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) =
?y'

        
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp cc _ _) _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (pre_whisker f η)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₁))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (pre_whisker f η)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₁))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη) x) =
?b
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (pre_whisker f η)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₁))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη) x) =
?b

        
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (pre_whisker f η)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₁))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f bb)
          (functor_composite_data f
             (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
          (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη) x)

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp cc _ _) _ @ _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (pre_whisker f η)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₁))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη)
        x)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (pre_whisker f η)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₁))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη)
        x))

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
# (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
  (idtoiso
     (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η gg₁
        gg₂ ηη
        (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) =
?t20

?t20 =
# (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))))
  (idtoiso
     (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η gg₁
        gg₂ ηη
        (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))

            apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# (pr1 cc) _)).

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) =
?y'

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
          (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
             η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
             (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp cc _ _) _)).

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
        (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η
           gg₁ gg₂ ηη
           (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
             (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) = ?t2

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?t2 =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
        (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η
           gg₁ gg₂ ηη
           (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (f (pr1 x)))
             (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat _ (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id cc _) _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
              (f (pr1 x),,
               pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
             (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (pre_whisker f η)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₁))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη)
        x))

f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
              (f (pr1 x),,
               pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
             (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) = ?b

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (pre_whisker f η)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₁))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη)
        x))

gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
              (f (pr1 x),,
               pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
             (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) = ?b

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
        a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              η gg₁ gg₂ ηη
              (f (pr1 x),,
               pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
             (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat _ (_ @ eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id cc _) _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g₁, g₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff: Core.mor_disp aa bb f
gg₁: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₁
gg₂: Core.mor_disp bb cc g₂
ηη: disp_2cells η gg₁ gg₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 x)), g₂ (f (pr1 x))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# cc z)
           (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
        (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof2
           a b c f g₁ g₂ η aa bb cc ff gg₁ gg₂ ηη x) @
      (eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (η (f (pr1 x)))
            (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 x)))))
         (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq η
            gg₁ gg₂ ηη
            (f (pr1 x),, pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))) @
      eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id cc (g₂ (f (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg₂ (pr1 f (pr1 x)))
           (ff (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g₁ (f (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg₁ (f (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (pre_whisker f η)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₁ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₁))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f bb)
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g₂ cc)) ff
           (pre_whisker f gg₂)) (disp_lwhisker ff ηη)
        x))

      apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
  
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁ gg)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_rwhisker gg ηη))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ p : # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) f₁
            · # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g ==>
            # (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
              (f₂ · g),
      disp_2cells p
        (Core.comp_disp
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁)
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg))
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (Core.comp_disp ff₂ gg)))
     (psfunctor_rwhisker
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats) g η)
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_rwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg)
           (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₂ gg)))

f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧

η: f₁ ==> f₂

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁ gg)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_rwhisker gg ηη))) =
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_rwhisker
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₂ gg))

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
∏ x : pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa),
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁ gg)
     (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
        (disp_rwhisker gg ηη))) x =
pr1
  (disp_vcomp2
     (disp_rwhisker
        (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
     (disp_psfunctor_comp
        disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
        (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
        (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₂ gg))
  x

gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)

  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_rwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg)

        (disp_psfunctor_comp

aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁ gg)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_rwhisker gg ηη))) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : c
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff₁)
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         gg)) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    (Core.comp_disp ff₂ gg)) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff₁)
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    gg)) x))) ?p)
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_rwhisker
             (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                gg)
             (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ηη))
          (disp_psfunctor_comp
             disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
             (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
             (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
             functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₂
             gg)) x)

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁ gg)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_rwhisker gg ηη))) x) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_rwhisker
           (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data gg)
           (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ηη))
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₂ gg))
     x)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id_left, id_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr2
  (pr1
     (disp_vcomp2
        (disp_psfunctor_comp
           disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
           (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
           (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
           functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₁ gg)
        (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
           (disp_rwhisker gg ηη))) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : c
            ⟦ pr1
                (pr1
                   (Core.comp_disp
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         ff₁)
                      (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                         gg)) x),
            pr1
              (pr1
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    (Core.comp_disp ff₂ gg)) x) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr2
           (pr1
              (Core.comp_disp
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    ff₁)
                 (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                    gg)) x)))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· pr2
    (pr1
       (disp_vcomp2
          (disp_rwhisker
             (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                gg)
             (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
                ηη))
          (disp_psfunctor_comp
             disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
             (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
             (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
             functors_into_cat_comprehension_data ff₂
             gg)) x)
 
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (post_whisker η g)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₁
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
          (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₂
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
          (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))
        · # (pr1 (gg (f₂ (pr1 x))))
            (idtoiso
               (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (post_whisker η g)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₁
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
          (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₂
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
          (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη) x) =
?b
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))
        · # (pr1 (gg (f₂ (pr1 x))))
            (idtoiso
               (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x)))))
    (pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (post_whisker η g)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₁
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
          (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₂
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
          (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη) x) =
?b

           (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

          apply (pr1_maponpaths_idtoiso (# (pr1 cc) _)).

           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))

gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp cc _ _) _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats

g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths
        (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (post_whisker η g)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₁
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
          (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₂
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
          (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη) x) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))
        · # (pr1 (gg (f₂ (pr1 x))))
            (idtoiso
               (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧

gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths
        (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (post_whisker η g)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₁
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
          (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₂
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
          (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη) x) =

gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))
        · # (pr1 (gg (f₂ (pr1 x))))
            (idtoiso
               (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (post_whisker η g)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₁

a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths
        (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))
· idtoiso
    (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
       (post_whisker η g)
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₁
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
          (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
       (nat_trans_comp aa
          (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
          (functor_composite_data f₂
             (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
          (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη) x)

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp cc _ _) _ @ _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (post_whisker η g)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₁
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
           (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₂
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
           (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη)
        x)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))
        · # (pr1 (gg (f₂ (pr1 x))))
            (idtoiso
               (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))))

gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))
        · # (pr1 (gg (f₂ (pr1 x))))
            (idtoiso
               (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (eq_in_set_fiber
             (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
             (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
                (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (post_whisker η g)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₁
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
           (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₂
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
           (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη)
        x))

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))

   · # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))
       (idtoiso
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))
        · # (pr1 (gg (f₂ (pr1 x))))
            (idtoiso
               (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                  η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x)))
   · pr1

             (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))

                (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))) =

           (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))

             (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) = 
?t2

        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))

x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· # (pr1 (# cc (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))))

aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?y' =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
          (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
             gg
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
           maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
             (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))))

          apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_comp cc _ _) _)).
        
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g gg
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
              η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
         maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
             (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) = 
?t2

ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?t2 =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (eq_in_set_fiber
        (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
           (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
      maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
        (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g gg
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
              η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
         maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
           (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
              η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
             (pr1 (pr1 ff₂ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x)))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat _ (eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id cc _) _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
              gg
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
            maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f₂ (pr1 x)))
             (ff₂ (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (post_whisker η g)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₁
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
           (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₂
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
           (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη)
        x))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
              gg
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
            maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f₂ (pr1 x)))
             (ff₂ (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) = ?b
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (post_whisker η g)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₁
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
           (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₂
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
           (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη)
        x))

      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
              gg
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
            maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f₂ (pr1 x)))
             (ff₂ (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) = ?b

        
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
?b =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x)) ⟧,
      pr1 (# cc z)
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
           (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
     (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
        a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((eq_in_set_fiber
           (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
              (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
         maponpaths
           (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
              gg
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
            maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
              (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
                 η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))) @
        eq_in_set_fiber
          (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
          (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f₂ (pr1 x)))
             (ff₂ (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))))

        apply (pr1_idtoiso_concat _ (_ @ eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id cc _) _)).
      
a, b, c: bicat_of_strict_cats
f₁, f₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
aa: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) a
bb: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) b
cc: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) c
ff₁: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₁
ff₂: Core.mor_disp aa bb f₂
gg: Core.mor_disp bb cc g
ηη: disp_2cells η ff₁ ff₂
x: pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension_data a aa)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 x)), g (f₂ (pr1 x))
               ⟧,
         pr1 (# cc z)
           (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
              (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))
        (is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension_subproof3
           a b c f₁ f₂ g η aa bb cc ff₁ ff₂ gg ηη x) @
      (eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (# g (η (pr1 x)))
            (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths (# (pr1 cc) (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 x)))))
         (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_eq g
            gg
            (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data
               η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x) @
          maponpaths (pr1 gg (f₂ (pr1 x)))
            (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
               η ff₁ ff₂ ηη x))) @
      eq_in_set_fiber (functor_id cc (g (f₂ (pr1 x))))
        (pr1 (pr1 gg (pr1 f₂ (pr1 x)))
           (ff₂ (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     ((eq_in_set_fiber
         (functor_comp cc (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
            (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))) @
       maponpaths
         (# (pr1 cc) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 x))))
         (eq_in_set_fiber
            (functor_id cc (g (f₁ (pr1 x))))
            (pr1 (pr1 gg (f₁ (pr1 x)))
               (pr1 (pr1 ff₁ (pr1 x)) (pr2 x))))) @
      nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq
        (post_whisker η g)
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₁ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₁
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₁
           (pre_whisker f₁ gg))
        (nat_trans_comp aa
           (functor_composite_data f₂ bb)
           (functor_composite_data f₂
              (functor_composite_data g cc)) ff₂
           (pre_whisker f₂ gg)) (disp_rwhisker gg ηη)
        x))

      apply setcategory_eq_idtoiso.
Qed.

Definition functors_into_cat_comprehension
  : disp_psfunctor
      disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
      (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
      (id_psfunctor bicat_of_strict_cats)
  := functors_into_cat_comprehension_data
     ,,
     is_disp_psfunctor_functors_into_cat_comprehension.

(**
 2. Preservation of cartesian cells
 *)

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
has_pb_ump
  (make_pb_cone (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁)
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α)
           (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α))))


C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
has_pb_ump
  (make_pb_cone (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁)
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α)
           (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α))))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁: C₁ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
G₂: C₂ ⟶ cat_of_setcategory
α: G₁ ⟹ F ∙ G₂
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
pb_ump_1
  (make_pb_cone (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁)
     (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₁)
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α)

          (total_setcategory_of_set_functor G₁)

 abstract
        (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro z ; cbn ;
         rewrite (functor_id F) ;
         rewrite !id_left, id_right ;
         exact (!(nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_rinv (pb_cone_cell x)) z))).

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
β₁: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₁
β₂: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₂
p: disp_2cells α β₁ β₂
Hp: is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat p
∏ x : pr11 (functors_into_cat_comprehension C₁ G₁),
is_opcartesian_sopfib
  (pr2 (functors_into_cat_comprehension C₂ G₂))
  ((pr11 (♯♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension p)) x)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_strict_cats
F₁, F₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
α: F₁ ==> F₂
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
β₁: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₁
β₂: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₂
p: disp_2cells α β₁ β₂
Hp: is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat p
∏ x : ∑ x : pr1 C₁, pr1 (G₁ x),
is_opcartesian_sopfib
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data α β₁
     β₂ p x)

     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂

p: disp_2cells α β₁ β₂
Hp: is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat p
x: ∑ x : pr1 C₁, pr1 (G₁ x)
is_opcartesian_sopfib
  (pr1_total_category_of_set_functor G₂)
  (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data α β₁
     β₂ p x)

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
β₁: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₁
β₂: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₂
p: disp_2cells α β₁ β₂
Hp: is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat p
x: ∑ x : pr1 C₁, pr1 (G₁ x)
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr2
     (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_data α
        β₁ β₂ p x))

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_strict_cats
F₁, F₂: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
α: F₁ ==> F₂
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
β₁: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₁
β₂: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F₂
p: disp_2cells α β₁ β₂
Hp: is_opcartesian_2cell
  disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat p
x: ∑ x : pr1 C₁, pr1 (G₁ x)
is_z_isomorphism
  (idtoiso
     (nat_trans_total_category_of_set_functor_eq α β₁
        β₂ p x))

  apply z_iso_is_z_isomorphism.
Qed.


global_cartesian_disp_psfunctor
  functors_into_cat_comprehension


global_cartesian_disp_psfunctor
  functors_into_cat_comprehension

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_strict_cats
F: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
