  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
Hα: cartesian_1cell disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat α
cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat bicat_of_strict_cats)
  (♯ functors_into_cat_comprehension α)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_strict_cats
F: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
Hα: cartesian_1cell disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat α
has_pb_ump
  (make_pb_cone
     (pr1 (functors_into_cat_comprehension C₁ G₁))
     (pr2 (functors_into_cat_comprehension C₁ G₁))
     (functor_total_category_of_set_functor F α)
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (is_invertible_2cell_bicat_of_strict_cat
           (functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α)
           (is_nat_z_iso_functor_total_category_of_set_functor_comm
              F α))))

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_strict_cats
F: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G₁: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₁
G₂: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat) C₂
α: Core.mor_disp G₁ G₂ F
Hα: cartesian_1cell disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat α
is_nat_z_iso α

  exact (functors_into_cat_cartesian_1cell_is_nat_iso _ Hα).
Defined.

(**
 3. The comprehension bicategory
 *)
Definition functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure
  : comprehension_bicat_structure bicat_of_strict_cats
  := disp_bicat_of_functors_into_cat
     ,,
     functors_into_cat_comprehension
     ,,
     functors_into_cat_global_cleaving
     ,,
     global_cartesian_functors_into_cat_comprehension.


is_covariant
  functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure


is_covariant
  functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure

  
local_opcleaving
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
lwhisker_opcartesian
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
rwhisker_opcartesian
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
local_opcartesian_disp_psfunctor
  (comp_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)

  
local_opcleaving
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
 exact functors_into_cat_local_opcleaving.
  
lwhisker_opcartesian
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
 
w, x, y: bicat_of_strict_cats
ww: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (ty_of
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure))
  w
xx: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (ty_of
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure))
  x
yy: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (ty_of
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure))
  y
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ w, x ⟧
f, g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧
hh: Core.mor_disp ww xx h
ff: Core.mor_disp xx yy f
gg: Core.mor_disp xx yy g
α: f ==> g
αα: disp_2cells α ff gg
X: is_opcartesian_2cell
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
  αα
is_opcartesian_2cell
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
  (disp_lwhisker hh αα)

    apply functors_into_cat_is_opcartesian_2cell.
  
rwhisker_opcartesian
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
 
x, y, z: bicat_of_strict_cats
xx: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (ty_of
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure))
  x
yy: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (ty_of
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure))
  y
zz: Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (ty_of
        functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure))
  z
f, g: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: bicat_of_strict_cats ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: Core.mor_disp xx yy f
gg: Core.mor_disp xx yy g
hh: Core.mor_disp yy zz h
α: f ==> g
αα: disp_2cells α ff gg
X: is_opcartesian_2cell
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
  αα
is_opcartesian_2cell
  (ty_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
  (disp_rwhisker hh αα)

    apply functors_into_cat_is_opcartesian_2cell.
  
local_opcartesian_disp_psfunctor
  (comp_of
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure)
 exact local_opcartesian_functors_into_cat_comprehension.
Defined.

Definition functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat
  : comprehension_bicat
  := _
     ,,
     functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat_structure
     ,,
     is_covariant_functors_into_cat_comprehension_bicat.
